title: Phenol-Chloroform environmental DNA (eDNA) Extraction Protocol for Okeanos Explorer Specimens
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2q0fc","text":"This protocol is used to extract environmental DNA (eDNA) from disc filters through which water samples taken by NOAA Ocean Exporation's NOAA Ship Okeanos Explorer have been filtered. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"dqsn8","text":"\n ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7jaku","text":"Perform all steps (besides the centrifugations) in the fume hood with UV light in the Pre-PCR lab (lab free of PCR products).","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7uhge","text":"Wear nitrile gloves at all steps. Wipe down with DNAaway frequently.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eka5v","text":"Prior to starting work, wipe the work surface with a Hype-Wipe (contains bleach) and allow it to air dry. Next, wipe the surface with dilute ethanol (70%). Lastly, run the UV lamp in the hood for 15 minutes. ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ar24r","text":"Wipe pipettes with a DNAaway or a Hype-Wipe, followed by a wipe with a Kim-wipe or paper towel moistened with dilute ethanol. Place the pipettes in the fume hood prior to running the UV light.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1v004","text":"Use only pipette filter tips.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7p4ce","text":"Chill isopropanol and ethanol on ice prior to using.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"39tpp","text":"Allow PCI solution (Autogen Buffer R3) to equilibrate to room temperature for at least 30 min before using.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"fgd1r","text":"MATERIALS","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2pdpg","text":"      200 µL and 1000 µL filtered tips (sterile)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7m3ev","text":"      P200 and P1000 single-channel pipette","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"adghl","text":"      1.5 mL LoBind Eppendorf tubes (autoclaved, sterile)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9gua2","text":"      5.0 mL LoBind Eppendorf tubes (autoclaved, sterile)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7kbi2","text":"      Simport 2.0 mL Cryovial with Silicon washer (T310-2A)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"els8o","text":"      KimWipes","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"hrei","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"756eu","text":"Reagents needed:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"27q11","text":"      DNAaway and/or Hype-wipes (with Bleach)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dil14","text":"     Freshly made Longmire's buffer (for extraction blanks)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"34vp7","text":"Proteinase K solution (20 mg/ml) (e.g. Qiagen Proteinase K or Autogen supply)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eo31i","text":"Autogen Buffer R3 (Phenol chloroform isoamyl alcohol) ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6vgkq","text":"Isopropanol     (100%)  ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7f98r","text":"Ethanol     (70%) ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"au3ji","text":"Autogen resuspension buffer (R9)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
